name: Timber Ridge Golf Club
about: Timber Ridge Golf Club offers year-round golf experiences through its indoor simulator facility and 18-hole outdoor course. The venue features four high-definition golf simulators equipped with course graphics and ball tracking technology, allowing golfers to play on world-famous courses regardless of weather. An on-site Pub & Grill provides dining options, while a fully stocked Pro Shop caters to all golfing needs. The club hosts various leagues, private events, and maintains a professional course that is open daily during the outdoor season.
why_golfers_like_it: Year-round access to climate-controlled indoor simulators
Full bar and food service available for a complete experience
Spacious, private setup that is ideal for events and group outings
Advanced ball tracking technology for accurate practice
Affordable pricing at $40 per hour per bay

food_and_drink.notes: Pub & Grill offers a variety of food options including weekly and seasonal specials.

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not explicitly state whether clubs are provided or if you must bring your own.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has a Pub & Grill that offers food and drinks, but it does not mention a BYOB policy.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the time required to complete 18 holes in the simulators.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is family-friendly and offers accommodations for groups, though it does not mention specific children's amenities.
